description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set on a large, manicured green lawn with a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The structure features a central rectangular block flanked by two symmetrical wings, each with a dark, hipped roof. The main entrance is accentuated by a small portico and is accessible via a straight path bordered by low fencing. The rear of the bungalow opens to a patio area, and the windows are arranged symmetrically across the front and sides, providing a balanced and formal appearance. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roofing, and the overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall, enhancing its stately and private character.
description: A stately, single-story Colonial Revival bungalow with symmetrical wings, dark hipped roofs, and a central entrance set on a large green lawn with a paved walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical wings, central walkway, and low boundary wall.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the wings, side windows, and the expanse of the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio area, rear windows, and the uninterrupted green lawn.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right wing, side entrance, and the continuation of the boundary wall.
